title: Legal Metrology Registration & LMPC Certificate

hero.headline: Get Legal Metrology Registration with Professionals Law
hero.subtext: Mandatory for Packaged Goods | Manufacturer, Importer & Packer Compliance | Quick, Expert Filing

mainHeading: Legal Metrology Registration & LMPC Certificate Online in India

introduction.heading: Introduction and Its Compliance
body: Legal Metrology Registration is a mandatory compliance under the Legal Metrology Act, 2009, for manufacturers, packers, importers and dealers of packaged goods, weights and measuring instruments in India. This law, among other things, guarantees the correctness and uniformity of weights and measures in commerce. Professionals Law assist end to end in obtaining Legal Metrology Registration by drafting application, documentations and follow-ups with the Department of Legal Metrology to get your application approved on time along with compliance of the necessary regulations.

whyNeeded.heading: Why It Is Needed
body: Legal Metrology Registration is mandatory to maintain standard accuracy and compliance of weights and measures used in trade. It is meant to safeguard consumer rights, check unfair trade practices and bring in transparency to the sale of packaged commodities. Professionals Law guarantees proper compliance in order to not risk regulatory fines or lose trust with buyers and regulators.

criteria: Any individual, company, LLP or firm engaged in manufacturing, packing, importing or dealing in packaged commodities or weighing/measuring instruments.
Must have a valid business address and manufacturing/packing/import facility in India.
Business should not have been previously penalized under the Legal Metrology Act for serious violations.

body.title: Market Legitimacy
body.description: Legal Metrology Registration legitimizes your products in the market by proving compliance with packaging and labelling regulations set by the government.

body.title: Consumer Trust
body.description: It builds consumer confidence as accurate quantity, weight and price labelling ensures fair value and clarity for end users.

body.title: Regulatory Safety
body.description: It protects businesses from heavy fines, product seizures or bans by ensuring all packaged goods meet the legal labelling standards.

body.title: Wider Market Reach
body.description: Registered and compliant products are more readily accepted by retail chains, e-commerce platforms and export markets.

body.title: Improved Brand Image
body.description: Legal compliance improves the company’s credibility and public perception, supporting long-term growth and partnerships.

documents: PAN card of the business entity
Identity and address proof of the authorized signatory

body.description: Professionals Law reviews your business operations to determine applicable registration types (manufacturer/packer/importer).
Collection and vetting of all documents and packaging labels for compliance.
Submission of the online or physical application with the Legal Metrology Department.
Site or product inspection by the authorities.
Once verified, the registration certificate is granted.

body.title: Processing Time
body.description: The process for Legal Metrology Registration typically takes 15 to 30 working days

body.title: Non-Compliance Penalties
body.description: Failure to comply with Legal Metrology laws can result in heavy penalties ranging from ₹5,000 to ₹1,00,000, seizure of goods or even imprisonment depending on the severity.

body.title: Unregistered Sales
body.description: Selling or distributing products without proper labelling or registration is considered a punishable offense.

body.question: Is Legal Metrology Registration mandatory for all packaged goods?
body.answer: Yes, if you are manufacturing, importing or selling packaged goods in India, registration is mandatory.

body.question: Who issues the Legal Metrology Certificate?
body.answer: The Department of Legal Metrology under the State Controller or Central Government, depending on the nature of the business.

body.question: What happens if products are sold without Legal Metrology compliance?
body.answer: The products may be seized and penalties or legal actions may be initiated against the seller or manufacturer.

body.question: Can one registration cover multiple products?
body.answer: Yes, but each product and label format must be disclosed and approved in the registration.

body.question: Is there a difference between packer and manufacturer registration?
body.answer: Yes, a manufacturer makes the product while a packer only packages it. Separate registrations are required for each role.

body.question: Is import of measuring equipment allowed without registration?
body.answer: No, importers must have a valid Legal Metrology Importer Registration to import such goods.

body.question: Does it apply to e-commerce sellers too?
body.answer: Yes, e-commerce businesses selling packaged products must also comply with Legal Metrology laws.

body.question: Is renewal required for Legal Metrology Registration?
body.answer: Yes, registration typically needs to be renewed periodically, depending on the state laws.

body.question: How can Professionals Law help in this process?
body.answer: Professionals Law assists in end-to-end documentation, compliance, filing and liaison with authorities to ensure a hassle-free registration process.
